## Database â€” Drift schema v9

- `card_events`: id, flashcard_id, type, occurred_at, detail
- `decks`: id, folder_id, name, target_language, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `flashcards`: id, deck_id, front, back, example_sentence, pronunciation, hint, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `flashcard_progress`: flashcard_id, box_number, due_at, review_count, lapse_count, is_suspended, buried_until, last_reset_at
- `flashcard_tags`: flashcard_id, tag, PRIMARY
- `folders`: id, parent_id, name, content_mode, color, icon, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `study_sessions`: id, entry_type, entry_ref_id, study_type, status, started_at, updated_at
- `study_session_items`: id, session_id, flashcard_id, sort_order, answered_at, created_at, updated_at
- `study_attempts`: id, session_item_id, result, study_mode, box_before, box_after, user_input, attempted_at, duration_ms
- `study_match_evaluations`: id, session_id, session_item_id, flashcard_id, board_index, pair_id, selected_front_cell_id, selected_back_cell_id, expected_front_flashcard_id, expected_back_flashcard_id, is_correct, attempt_order, evaluated_at, created_at
- `tts_settings`: id, auto_play, front_language, rate, pitch, volume, front_voice_name

## Domain

- Use cases: dashboard(2), deck(6), flashcard(10), folder(9), history(1), progress(5), search(1), study(12), tag(4) + study(0: )
- Repository ports: `account_repository.dart`, `appearance_settings_repository.dart`, `card_history_repository.dart`, `content_sort_repository.dart`, `dashboard_repository.dart`, `example_repository.dart`, `flashcard_repository.dart`, `folder_repository.dart`, `language_settings_repository.dart`, `learning_settings_repository.dart`, `progress_repository.dart`, `search_repository.dart`, `study_entry_repository.dart`, `study_repository.dart`, `tag_repository.dart`, `tts_settings_repository.dart` + `lib/domain/study/ports/study_repo.dart`
